description: A video component featuring a poster image overlay with a play button. On click, reveals a Brightcove/YouTube video player. Can appear as a full-width feature or inline within an article body.

layout.structure: Poster image with overlay controls, replaced by video player on interaction

FR-01.title: Poster Image Display
FR-01.description: The block MUST display a poster image as the initial state before video playback.
acceptance: High-quality poster image fills the video container
Image alt text describes the video content

FR-02.title: Play Button Overlay
FR-02.description: A play button MUST be overlaid on the poster image.
acceptance: Play icon visually centered on the poster
Button labeled 'Play Video' or 'Watch X:XX' with duration

FR-03.title: Video Title and Subtitle
FR-03.description: The block SHOULD display an H2 title and optional subtitle overlaid on or near the poster.
acceptance: H2 heading displayed on the poster overlay
Text readable against the poster image (contrast ensured)

FR-04.title: Video Player Activation
FR-04.description: Clicking the play button MUST activate the embedded video player (Brightcove or YouTube).
acceptance: Poster image transitions to active video player
Standard video controls available (play/pause, volume, fullscreen, progress bar)
Video player has accessible name via ARIA region

FR-05.title: Responsive Behavior
FR-05.description: The video block MUST maintain aspect ratio and function at all viewports.
acceptance: Controls scale appropriately at mobile sizes
Poster image responsive to container width

A.variantName: Full-Width Poster with Centered Text Overlay
A.description: Large full-width video feature with a cinematic poster image, title overlay, and prominent watch button. Used as a standalone section on hub pages.

additionalRequirements.FR-A01: Poster MUST span the full content width (up to 1330px within container).
additionalRequirements.FR-A02: Title and play button centered on the poster.

styling.overlayStyle: Semi-transparent dark gradient over poster for text readability

B.description: A smaller, contained video embed used within article body content. Does not span full width.

additionalRequirements.FR-B01: Video container constrained to article body width (~640px).
additionalRequirements.FR-B02: No overlaid title or subtitle on the poster.
additionalRequirements.FR-B03: Integrates inline within article text flow.

accessibility.AC-01: Video player region MUST have an accessible name (ARIA label with video title)
accessibility.AC-02: Play button MUST be keyboard accessible
accessibility.AC-04: Auto-play MUST NOT be enabled for inline video embeds
accessibility.AC-05: Focus MUST move to video controls after activation
